rationale: This page is a full-page advertisement for Vision IAS coaching programs. It highlights their past achievements in UPSC CSE results from 2013 to 2024 and provides schedules for upcoming General Studies Foundation Courses in various cities. It contains no academic content for International Relations.
cleanedText:
VISION IAS: INSPIRING INNOVATION
OUR ACHIEVEMENTS
NO. OF SELECTIONS (2013-2024):
- 2013: 200+ selections, Gaurav Agrawal (AIR 1)
- 2015: 500+ selections, Tina Dabi (AIR 1)
- 2016: 600+ selections, Anmol Sher Singh Bedi (AIR 2)
- 2017: 8 in TOP 10, Sachin Gupta (AIR 3)
- 2018: 9 in TOP 10, Kanishak Kataria (AIR 1)

- 2022: 39 in TOP 50, Ishita Kishore (AIR 1)
- 2023: 79 in TOP 100, Aditya Srivastava (AIR 1)
